title: Still using Evernote because no way to add a quick note with 1 or 2 clicks?
excerpt: I don’t see how I can stop using Evernote because I don’t find a quick way to add a note from my phone or laptop like I do with Evernote. The Docs feature does not work that way. Besides, am I supposed to copy all my eve…

posts.author: arbrador (Lora Arbrador)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t see how I can stop using Evernote because I don’t find a quick way to add a note from my phone or laptop like I do with Evernote. The Docs feature does not work that way. Besides, am I supposed to copy all my evernotes into docs? Perhaps Monday is just a limited app and I’ll need to keep using Evernote. I just ended my free trial and don’t know if it’s worth paying for just a glorified to do list. I don’t have a team. Thank you.
